stemHtml: You are flying from point A to B. Planned track 120°, Distance 130 NM and GS 240 kts. After 25 minutes of flying, you fix your position to be 6 NM left of planned track. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.b: You should turn 15 degrees right to go direct to B.
options.c: You should turn 7 degrees right to go direct to B.
